title: Ls03D 65 Inch Black Qa65Ls03Dauswk
features: The FrameYour Art Gallery on TV
Enjoy what's on with less reflection

Tired of distracting glare on your TV screen? The Frame's ground-breaking Matte Display absorbs reflections, so you can clearly see what's on display and enjoy the textures and details of art the way they were meant to be.
Designed to look like a slim picture frame
Elegantly minimal and modern, The Frame TV installs near flush to the wall like an actual picture frame, allowing it to blend beautifully into your home.
Match to your space with customizable bezels

Switch up the color and style of The Frame TV with customizable bezel frames. Choose from a variety of color options to find one that blends into your space. The sleek magnetic bezel snaps onto the sides for quick, easy installation.
When The Frame is off, art is displayed
Transform The Frame into art when you're not watching TV. You'll love viewing beautiful works of art on the big screen.
ART
Bring world-famous galleries into your living room

Access over 2,500 works of art and photography from world-renowned institutions in the Art Store. From beloved classics to modern masterpieces, there's a wealth of choices for curating your own home art gallery.
Explore a curated stream of art for free
Dive into the world of art and discover new favorite pieces through your TV. With The Frame, you get access to a regularly updated collection of artwork curated from leading artists and institutions.
Enjoy artful colors validated by PANTONE

Meet fully authentic color expression validated by PANTONE. The Frame reproduces the rich colors and textures of your favorite artwork with high fidelity. And with a matte display that reduces glare, you can enjoy a clear view of your collection and appreciate it like in an actual museum.
DESIGN
Snap on. Style up.

The Frame offers magnetic bezels in a variety of colors, so you can just snap on the one that suits your style. The sleek, straight lines and smooth finish come together in a modern design that truly completes your TV.
Height that fits your space
Set The Frame to your preferred height with the Height Adjustable Stand. You can raise it up to make room for a soundbar and other devices.
QLED Technology
Samsung Tizen OS Experience
Upscale your entertainment with Samsung Tizen OS

Get more out of your TV with the latest apps & services on Samsung Tizen OS. Enjoy free live TV channels and thousands of movies with Samsung TV Plus, and seamless cloud gaming with Gaming Hub. You can even manage your daily activities with Daily+ and control your smart devices from your TV with SmartThings – all while Knox Security keeps your privacy.

specifications.Multi Device Experience: TV to Mobile, Mobile to TV, TV initiate mirroring, Sound Mirroring, Tap View, Wireless TV On
specifications.Voice Guide: UK English, France French, Korean, Russian, Hindi
specifications.Low Vision Support: Audio Subtitles, Magnification, Audio Description, Zoom Menu and Text, High Contrast, SeeColors, Color Inversion, Grayscale, Auto Picture Off
specifications.Hearing Impaired Support: Closed Caption (Subtitle), Multi-output Audio, Caption Position, Sign Language Zoom, Separate Closed Caption
specifications.Motor Impaired Support: Slow Button Repeat, Remote Control App. for All
